description_long: This lamp features a cylindrical brown base made of what appears to be metal or painted wood, supporting a large, drum-shaped fabric lampshade in a light beige or off-white color. The shade is smooth and slightly textured, providing a soft diffusion of light. A black electrical cord extends from the base, ending in a standard plug, indicating it is powered by mains electricity. The lamp's design is minimalist and modern, with clean lines and no visible decorative embellishments aside from the subtle texture of the shade. The proportions suggest it is intended for use on a table or desk, providing localized illumination. The overall construction appears sturdy, with the shade securely mounted atop the base.
description: A modern table lamp with a cylindrical brown base and a large, light fabric drum shade, featuring a black power cord.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cylindrical brown base, large fabric drum shade, and the black cord extending to the right.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the smooth, continuous surface of the base and the even, round shape of the shade.
description_view_2: Rear view with the cord extending out to the left, showing the back of the base and the full roundness of the shade.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the lamp's height and the proportional relationship between the base and the shade.
